song.title: A Bar in My Pocket
song.keywords: hookup apps, phone addiction, endless scrolling, The Unseen Chorus
song.description: Full lyrics to 'A Bar in My Pocket' from The Unseen Chorus (A Gay Musical) by Agust Islandia (Agust Smari Bjarkarson).

og.title: A Bar in My Pocket Lyrics - The Unseen Chorus Musical
og.description: Hookup app addiction track from The Unseen Chorus. 'A bar in my pocket, it's open all night.'

twitter.title: A Bar in My Pocket Lyrics - The Unseen Chorus
twitter.description: 'A bar in my pocket, it's open all night. Endless torsos glowing bright.'

essay: "A Bar in My Pocket" captures the seductive pull of hookup apps in the digital age. The song uses the metaphor of a bar — always open, endlessly stocked — to explore how gay dating apps create an illusion of abundance while feeding compulsive scrolling behavior.

The protagonist revels in the endless grid of bodies and the thrill of one-tap access to connection, even as the lyrics hint at the hollow repetition underneath: "Every torso looks the same." It is a darkly comedic anthem about digital desire and the addictive loop of swipe culture.
song.lyricsHtml:
Look what I found just one little tap
A whole damn bar right here in my lap
No cover charge no waiting in line
A menu of men oh the pleasure is mine

A bar in my pocket it's open all night
Endless torsos glowing bright
A bar in my pocket a menu on my phone
So much meat I can grind alone
Grind alone grind alone

Endless grids torsos in rows
Abs on display nobody shows clothes
Swipe left swipe right tap to explore
One more message and ten more in store

A bar in my pocket no need to roam
Every stranger's face feels like home
A bar in my pocket a drink in my hand
Pour me another I can barely stand
Drink it down drink it down

Too old
Too femme
Too far
But oh that one yes that one

Tap tap tap it's a fever dream
Bodies in pixels a glowing stream
Chat pic meet it's a hungry game
Every torso looks the same

A bar in my pocket I'm high on the sound
Taps and swipes keep spinning me round
A bar in my pocket my own neon sign
I'm lost in the crowd but the pleasure is mine
Pleasure is mine pleasure is mine

All this meat
And it's all just one tap away
